title: Fix off-by-one in parseRange — end value excluded
fail_to_pass: single value range returns one element
pass_to_pass: returns empty array for invalid range
problem_statement: The parseRange function in src/range.ts uses a strict less-than operator (<) in the loop condition, so the end value is never included in the result. Fix it so parseRange(1, 5) returns [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] instead of [1, 2, 3, 4].
